payload.answer: The new fact appears to update the existing current fact: previously, Sam works at Goldman; the new claim says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72. This is a conflict because both cannot be current employment facts in the same sense at the same time. You can choose one of the safe actions: approve_supersession to treat the new fact as replacing the old current employment fact, keep_both if both should be retained without deciding that one supersedes the other, reject_new if the new claim should not be saved, or edit if the wording needs correction before saving.

entity_resolution.reason: Both facts refer to Sam and Goldman, but the system should preserve ambiguity until the user confirms how to handle the employment transition.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72

details: Explained only the backend-supplied safe actions.
Did not commit the new fact as durable memory.
Did not present the existing fact as superseded without approval.
